title: Psychology referral documentation

referral.text: Supports clinician-documented supportive discussion, questions, safety planning, treatment or medication decisions, monitoring, follow-up, and referral without autonomous treatment selection or doses.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-led depression management and referral context for psychology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented supportive discussion, questions, safety planning, treatment or medication decisions, monitoring, follow-up, and referral without autonomous treatment selection or doses.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression

exact_section.heading: Sections 8–9 — clinician-led management, monitoring, and referral

referral.text: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological or medication options, patient preference, treatment information, monitoring, and referral or relapse planning without autonomous treatment output.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-led psychological-treatment discussion and shared decisions for psychology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented discussion of psychological or medication options, patient preference, treatment information, monitoring, and referral or relapse planning without autonomous treatment output.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.17–1.2.33 and 1.2.44–1.2.48 — clinician-led treatment and shared decisions

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Reason, goals, symptoms, diagnosis, severity, risk, previous therapy, preference, consent, provider, urgency, communication and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for psychology referral documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
